title: rubus hirsutior
intro: Rubus hirsutior, also known as the Himalayan blackberry, is a species of bramble in the family Rosaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus hirsutior include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and support digestive health, making it a valuable remedy for various ailments. In herbal preparations, Rubus hirsutior is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as being incorporated into salves and creams for topical use.
